Mission & Vision

The Medina Foundation is a family foundation that funds basic human service organizations in the Puget Sound area. We follow our founder Norton Clapp's vision to improve the lives of those in need by fostering positive change and helping people attain independence and dignity.

Our activities are based on the following set of shared values:
  •  Compassion
  •  Innovation
  •  Integrity
  •  Stewardship
  •  Leadership
MEDINA FOUNDATION    |    801 SECOND AVENUE, SUITE 1108, SEATTLE, WA 98104    |    206 652 8783
